# NYX Studio

> AI-native content and growth studio for direct-to-consumer (D2C) brands
> selling in India. We build cinematic brand films, performance-creative
> ad units, content automation pipelines, and influencer ops under one
> roof. Based in Pune, Maharashtra. Co-founded by Atharv Paharia (Tech)
> and Bhavya Jain (Product) in 2025.

## About

- [About NYX Studio](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/about): Studio story, founders, philosophy, what we build and why
- [Home](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/): Manifesto, founders, partner directory, lead capture
- [Our Work](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/work): Case studies and brand films for Dessertino, Mango Jungle, Mango Shower, Brioso

## Services and pricing

- [Services and pricing](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/services): Trial Pack ₹30K/mo, Starter Pack ₹50K/mo, Growth Pack ₹80K/mo. Includes content strategy, paid social, creative production, brand growth
- [FAQ](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/services#faq): 14 questions covering pricing, turnaround, categories, AI vs live shoots, platforms, measurement, onboarding

## Contact and access

- [Contact](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/contact): Brief intake, scoping call request, direct email
- [Partner portal](https://www.nyxstudio.tech/portal): Login for existing brand partners — calendar, post approvals, asset library

- [Atharv Paharia on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/atharv-paharia-468276272/): Co-Founder and Tech Lead
- [Bhavya Jain on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/bhavya-jain-10963b33a/): Co-Founder and Product Lead
- [NYX Studio on Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/nyx.studios.ai/): Recent work, reels, behind the scenes
- [NYX Studio on LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/company/nyx-studio-ai/): Company page, hiring posts, founder commentary
